program_en: B.A. (English Studies) and B.Ed. (English Language Education)
program_chi: 文學士（英國語文研究）及教育學士（英國語文教育）
learning_outcomes:
ELEDN_Learning Outcomes_ENG 1.  |  Major Programme:
Graduates from the
programme will be able to:
(1)  |  nurture professional
English teachers with conceptual and theoretical knowledge in subject matter,
curricular and pedagogy; (K/S/V)
(2)  |  develop reflective
English teachers with a comprehensive view and insight on educational issues
in the local and global contexts; (K/S/V) and
(3)  |  produce effective
English teachers with solid and strong application skills for communication,
teaching and research. (K/S/V)
K = Knowledge outcomes; S = Skills
outcomes; V = Values & attitude outcomes

Explanatory
Notes:
1. 2.  |  EDUC, ELED, ELTU and ENGE courses at 2000 and above level as
included in the Major Programme Requirement will be included in the
calculation of Major GPA for honours classification. Students who have completed the courses ELED1010, 1020 and 1030
will be eligible to apply for exemption of 3 units of University Core
English Language Requirement course ELTU2013. Students are required to apply for the exemption. When
exemption from a particular course is recognized, students can only be
exempted from the course but not the units.
